headline: How to Stop Perplexity from Recommending Your Competitors
articleBody: Perplexity is different because it cites sources in real-time. If you aren't being cited, your firm lacks 'linkable' expert content. You need to publish data-rich articles that the AI views as a primary source. Stop letting competitors take your leads. We can audit your presence and start getting you cited in Perplexity’s citations immediately.
